Class HardwareDetails

Namespace
WindowsAudioWrapper.Models
Assembly
WindowsAudioWrapper.dll

Contains extended, low-level unmanaged property telemetry mapping for hardware endpoints. Strictly respects zero-null constraints for integration stability.
